# Catalog

## Skills

Skills are slash commands. Enable them with `skills.sh enable <name>`.

| Skill | Command | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| code-review | `/code-review` | Review code changes for bugs, style issues, and improvements |
| plan-with-me | `/plan-with-me` | ALWAYS invoke when the user describes a new feature, page, |

## Behaviors

Behaviors are auto-invoked via `@path` references in your project's `CLAUDE.md`.

| Behavior | Path | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
